# playwright-test

> Best practices and reference for Playwright Test (E2E). Covers how to write tests, avoiding fixed waits, network triggers, DnD, shard/retry setup on GitHub Actions, and more. Use when writing, reviewing, or configuring CI for Playwright tests.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/testing/playwright-test
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/testing/playwright-test
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients). Copy
the folder into your agent's skills directory (`~/.claude/skills/` for user
scope, `.claude/skills/` for a project):

```bash
npx degit mizchi/skills/testing/playwright-test ~/.claude/skills/playwright-test
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
